Legal Information

Thank you for choosing VAi, your innovative platform for AI-generated content creation. Before you explore and utilize our services, please take a moment to review the legal information outlined below. Your use of our website and services implies your acceptance of these terms and conditions.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using VAi, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.

2. Intellectual Property

All content and materials available on VAi, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, button icons, images, audio clips, and software, are the property of VAi or its content suppliers and are protected by intellectual property laws.

3. AI-Generated Content

VAi specializes in creating AI-generated content. Users are responsible for the content generated using our platform. VAi does not claim ownership of the content produced; users retain intellectual property rights for their generated content.

4. User Responsibilities

Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account credentials and are liable for all activities under their account. VAi reserves the right to terminate or suspend accounts found in violation of our terms.

5. Privacy Policy

Our Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. By using VAi, you consent to the terms of our Privacy Policy.

6. Limitation of Liability

VAi shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services or for any interruptions, errors, or delays in services.

7. Changes to Terms

VAi reserves the right to update and modify these terms and conditions at any time. Users are encouraged to check this page regularly for any changes. Continued use of the website after changes constitute acceptance of the modified terms.

8. Governing Law

These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Armenia. Any disputes arising out of or related to these terms will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Armenia.

If you have any questions or concerns regarding the legal information on this page, please contact us at legal-support@vai.com
